summary: Wired `computeTrustMetrics(projectRoot)` into `warcraft_status` by adding `projectRoot` to `ContextToolsDependencies`, threading it from `container.ts`'s `directory`, and adding a top-level `health` object with exactly `reopenRate`, `totalCompleted`, `reopenCount`, and `blockedMttrMs`. Added 4 unit tests covering health field presence, shape, default values, and computed values. Verification: `bun test context-tools.test.ts` — 4/4 pass; `bun run lint` — exit 0; full suite — 1322/1322 pass.

Added 7 focused tests for `warcraft_status` health payload in `context-tools.test.ts` (11 total, up from 4). New tests validate: health defaults when `.beads` dir is absent, excluded metric keys are not exposed (`duplicateDispatchPreventedCount`, `pruneDryRunCount`, etc.), `blockedMttrMs` returns a number for blocked/commit pairs, deterministic values from complex fixture (6 completions, 2 reopens, 2 MTTR pairs), correct value types for all health keys, and existing status fields are not altered by the health addition. Also extracted `writeEventsJsonl` and `getStatusHealth` helpers to reduce test boilerplate, and cleaned up unused imports (`mock`, `spyOn`, `StaleWorktreeInfo`).

Verification:
- `bun test packages/opencode-warcraft/src/tools/context-tools.test.ts`: 11 pass, 0 fail, 57 expect() calls
- `bun test packages/warcraft-core/src/services/event-logger.test.ts`: 19 pass, 0 fail, 51 expect() calls (no regressions)
- `bun run build`: exit 0
- `bun run lint`: exit 0 (typecheck + biome clean)

E2E lifecycle tests pass with the additive `health` field. Added 4 minimal assertions to the full-lifecycle scenario verifying `health` is present with expected field types (reopenRate, totalCompleted, reopenCount). No existing assertions changed; 17 expect() calls total (up from 13). All 4 E2E scenarios pass.

Verification evidence:
- E2E test: `bun test packages/opencode-warcraft/src/e2e/lifecycle.test.ts` → 4 pass, 0 fail, 17 expects (11.65s)
- Unit tests: `bun test packages/opencode-warcraft/src/tools/context-tools.test.ts` → 11 pass, 0 fail
- Build: `bun run build` → exit 0
- Lint: `bun run lint` → exit 0 (typecheck + biome clean)

Added optional `learnings?: string[]` to TaskStatus (types.ts), TaskStateArtifact and LegacyTaskState (artifactSchemas.ts), and mapped it in taskStateFromTaskStatus, taskStateToTaskStatus, and the legacy migration path in decodeTaskState. Added 5 new tests covering round-trip preservation, omission when absent, TaskStatus↔TaskStateArtifact conversion with/without learnings, and legacy migration without learnings. All changes are additive-only; no existing field semantics changed.

Verification:
- `bun test artifactSchemas.test.ts`: 17 pass, 0 fail
- `bun test` (warcraft-core full): 879 pass, 0 fail
- `bun run --filter warcraft-core typecheck`: exit 0
- `bunx biome check packages/warcraft-core --diagnostic-level=error`: 0 errors

Added optional `learnings` (string[]) input to `warcraft_worktree_commit` tool schema and wired it through both `taskService.update()` paths (blocked and completed). Also added `'learnings'` to `taskService.update()` Pick type to accept the new field. Learnings are only persisted when non-empty; omitting preserves existing behavior. 4 new tests cover completed/blocked persistence and backward compatibility. build: exit 0, test: exit 0 (22 pass, 0 fail), lint: exit 0

Extended dispatch + worker-prompt to thread learnings from done tasks into worker context. `fetchSharedDispatchData` reads `learnings` via `getRawStatus()` for done tasks only and folds them into summaries as bullet lists (subject to existing budget truncation). `CompletedTask` extended with optional `learnings?: string[]`. Tests: task-dispatch 8/8, worker-prompt 20/20, prompt-budgeting 19/19 (unchanged), full suite 466/466. build: exit 0, lint: exit 0.

Added optional `learnings` field to Mekkatorque's `warcraft_worktree_commit` success example in the Report section. The field is shown inline with a `// optional` comment and practical examples, making it clearly non-mandatory. Also added 3 prompt tests verifying learnings presence in the report section, optionality, and inclusion in both TDD and best-effort modes. test: 90 pass, 0 fail. lsp: clean.

Added 18 focused tests across 3 files for the learnings end-to-end flow: (1) worktree-commit-contract.test.ts — 13 new tests covering learnings acceptance with valid arrays, backward compatibility when omitted, empty array handling, blocked status persistence, and zod schema validation rejecting non-array/non-string payloads; (2) worktree-tools.test.ts — 3 new tests for empty learnings omission, partial/failed status learnings persistence; (3) worker-prompt.test.ts — 2 new tests for downstream learnings rendering in spec content and non-done task exclusion. build: exit 0, test: exit 0 (491/491 pass, was 473), lint: exit 0.

Hardened runtime handling of persisted `learnings` in both task-dispatch.ts and worktree-tools.ts with `sanitizeLearnings()` guards that reject non-arrays, filter non-string/empty entries, and return undefined when nothing valid remains. Added 7 regression tests in task-dispatch.test.ts proving malformed persisted learnings cannot crash or pollute summaries, and 3 tool-boundary contract tests in worktree-commit-contract.test.ts proving invalid payloads via execute() are silently sanitized. build: exit 0, test: exit 0 (501 pass, 0 fail), lint: exit 0

Enhanced stale worktree warning in `context-tools.ts` to include `ageInDays` (floor of lastCommitAge/86400000) per worktree entry, oldest age in the message, and actionable guidance mentioning both `warcraft_worktree_prune` and `warcraft_merge` with `cleanup: true`. Added 6 tests covering age computation, floor behavior, null omission, message content, and field preservation. No core service changes needed — `lastCommitAge` was already exposed. Verification: build exit 0, lint exit 0, 1386 tests pass (0 failures).

Added opt-in `cleanup` boolean parameter to `warcraft_merge` tool in `packages/opencode-warcraft/src/tools/worktree-tools.ts`. When `cleanup: true`, calls `worktreeService.remove(feature, task, false)` after successful merge; cleanup failures are non-fatal (merge stays successful, error surfaced in response). All merge success responses now include a `cleanup` object with `requested`, `removed`, and optionally `reason` or `error` fields. Added 5 TDD tests in `worktree-tools.test.ts` covering: omitted cleanup, explicit false, successful cleanup, failed cleanup (non-fatal), and cleanup with verification. Verification: build exit 0, test 1386 pass / 0 fail, lint exit 0.

Added 10 tests in new `stale warning payload shape and content` describe block in `context-tools.test.ts`. Tests validate: payload shape has exactly `count/message/worktrees` keys, worktree entry shape with/without `ageInDays`, singular/plural "day(s)" in message, null hygiene for empty and non-stale arrays, count excluding non-stale entries, age part omission when lastCommitAge is null, and full actionable message format. All deterministic using mock fixtures. Verification: build exit 0, lint exit 0, 27 tests pass (0 failures, 93 expects), full suite 517 pass.

Added 7 edge-case tests in `packages/opencode-warcraft/src/tools/worktree-tools.test.ts` in a new `mergeTaskTool cleanup edge cases` describe block, complementing Task 01's 6 cleanup tests. New tests cover: merge conflict failure skips cleanup, squash/rebase strategies with cleanup, cleanup error fallback message (no message property), cleanup failure + verification coexistence, task-not-found and task-not-done early exits skipping cleanup. Verification: build exit 0, test 38/38 pass (0 fail), lint exit 0, full suite 1393 pass.

Added merge cleanup behavior tests in `packages/opencode-warcraft/src/tools/worktree-tools.test.ts` covering cleanup requested, default/false behavior, merge failure, cleanup failure, and verification path; worker branch commit exists at `7fe3b2698dad58d6f04a4d998219d06908b0f685`.

Added merge cleanup behavior tests in `packages/opencode-warcraft/src/tools/worktree-tools.test.ts` covering cleanup requested, default/false behavior, merge failure, cleanup failure, and verification path; completed worker commit `7fe3b2698dad58d6f04a4d998219d06908b0f685`.

Verification-only task. In task 05 worktree, merged dependency branches for tasks 01-04 and confirmed clean integration with `bun test` in `packages/opencode-warcraft` (530 pass, 0 fail), `bun test` in `packages/warcraft-core` (879 pass, 0 fail), and `bun run build` (exit 0). No code changes were required.
